zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Bunker於1590年2月18日出生在英國英格蘭戴文拉特利時，他的父親Roger Bunker27歲，母親Mrs. Elizabeth Wright22歲。他於1605年6月與Agnes Norrish在英國戴文易亞斯特 阿林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1653年11月在英國戴文易亞斯特 阿林頓享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Bunker于1590年2月18日出生在英国英格兰戴文拉特利时，他的父亲Roger Bunker27岁，母亲Mrs. Elizabeth Wright22岁。他于1605年6月与Agnes Norrish在英国戴文易亞斯特 阿林頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1653年11月在英国戴文易亞斯特 阿林頓享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bunker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname, of Norman origin, for a reliable or good-hearted person, from Old French bon ‘good’ + cuer ‘heart’ (from Latin cor).
History: Bunker Hill in Charlestown, MA, was named as land assigned in 1634 to George Bunker of Charlestown, who had emigrated from Odell in Bedfordshire, England.

variants.name: Banker
meanings: English: from Middle English banker, banc(o)ur, bankquer, bankert ‘covering of tapestry or other fabric for a bench, couch, or chair; ornamental hanging’, possibly a nickname or occupational name for someone who made or sold such things.
English: occupational name possibly from Middle English benker, seemingly ‘maker of benches’ but recorded only in names.
English: perhaps a variant of   Bunker  .

variants.name: Bunkers
meanings: Possibly also an altered form of English   Bunker  .
In some cases possibly also Dutch: perhaps a variant of Benkers, itself a cognate of German Benkert . The surname Bunkers is very rare in the Netherlands.

variants.name: Boenker
meanings: occupational name for a carpenter, a rounded form of   Benker  .

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Bunker was born on 18 February 1590, in Rattery, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Bunker, was 27 and his mother, Mrs. Elizabeth Wright, was 22. He married Agnes Norrish in June 1605, in East Allington, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in November 1653, in East Allington, Devon, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Bunker est né le 18 février 1590, à Rattery, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Bunker, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Elizabeth Wright, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Norrish en juin 1605, à East Allington, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en novembre 1653, à East Allington, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Bunker am 18. Februar 1590 in Rattery, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Bunker 27 und seine Mutter Mrs. Elizabeth Wright 22. Er hat im Juni 1605 in East Allington, Devon, England Agnes Norrish geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb im November 1653 im Alter von 63 Jahren in East Allington, Devon, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Philip Bunker(이)가 1590년 2월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 래터이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Bunker(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Elizabeth Wright(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1605년 6월 영국 데폰 이스트 앨링턴에서 Agnes Norrish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1653년 11월 영국 데폰 이스트 앨링턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: нюбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Bunker родился 18 февраля 1590 г. в местности раттири, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Bunker было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Elizabeth Wright, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Norrish июнь 1605 г. в местности эаст аллингтон, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер ноябрь 1653 г. в местности эаст аллингтон, девон, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.
